name: SomeIpRemoveEventFromEventgroup
title: SomeIpRemoveEventFromEventgroup
syntax: long SomeIpRemoveEventFromEventgroup( dword pevgHandle, dword pevHandle );
description: Removes an Event created by SomeIpAddEvent from an Event Group which was created by SomeIpAddProvidedEventGroup. The Event itself is not deleted.

parameters.name: pevgHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event Group from which an Event should be removed (see SomeIpAddProvidedEventGroup).
